common.title: LocalPDF
common.privacyNotice: 100% Private Client-Side Processing. Your files never leave your browser.

merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.description: Combine multiple PDFs into a single document effortlessly.

split.title: Split PDF
split.description: Separate one page or a whole set for easy conversion into independent PDF files.

rotate.title: Rotate PDF
rotate.description: Rotate your PDFs the way you need them. You can even rotate multiple PDFs at once.

watermark.title: Add Watermark
watermark.description: Choose an image or text and stamp it over your PDF.

edit.title: Edit PDF
edit.description: Add text, images, shapes or freehand annotations to a PDF document.

ocr.title: OCR (Image to Text)
ocr.description: Extract text from scanned PDFs or images easily.

convert.title: Convert to PDF
convert.description: Convert JPG or PNG images into a PDF document entirely in your browser.

home.heroTitle: Every tool you need to work with PDFs in one place
home.heroSubtitle: 100% Free, Secure, and Local. Your files never leave your browser. Edit, merge, split, and convert your PDFs with zero server uploads.

merge.alertSelectTwo: Please select at least 2 PDFs to merge.
merge.alertError: An error occurred while merging PDFs.

split.alertSelectOne: Please select a PDF file first.
split.alertError: An error occurred while splitting the PDF.

rotate.alertSelectOne: Please select a PDF file first.
rotate.alertError: An error occurred while rotating the PDF.

watermark.alertSelectOne: Please select a PDF file first.
watermark.alertError: An error occurred while adding the watermark.

edit.alertSelectOne: Please select a PDF file first.
edit.alertError: An error occurred while loading the PDF.
edit.title: Edit PDF Content
edit.description: Add, remove, or rearrange pages, and add text annotations directly to your PDF.
edit.instructions: Click anywhere on the document to add text. Drag text to move it.
edit.alertMinPages: A PDF must have at least one page.
edit.alertLoadError: Could not read this PDF. It might be corrupted or protected.
edit.alertSaveError: An error occurred while saving the edited PDF.

ocr.alertError: An error occurred during OCR extraction.

convert.alertSelectOne: Please select at least 1 image file.
